g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should my Dockerfile look like for the profiler MCP server?')
sendPrompt('Show me the docker build and push commands for profiler-mcp')
sendPrompt('Which container registry does Kivor use? How do I push profiler-mcp to it?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the Kivor new deployment form fields for profiler-mcp')
sendPrompt('What ports and env vars should I set in the Kivor deployment form for profiler-mcp?')
sendPrompt('What environment variables do I need for the profiler-mcp Kivor deployment?')
sendPrompt('What happens after I click Create Deployment on Kivor for profiler-mcp?')
sendPrompt('How do I connect profiler-mcp running on Kivor to my LangGraph agent?')
sendPrompt('How do I view logs for a failed profiler-mcp deployment on Kivor?')
sendPrompt('What MCP server URL should I register in Kivor after deploying profiler-mcp?')
